programs.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programs.desc: Martin Hansen sells fish from the back of his boat after braving Cook Strait to catch it.

programs.title: Trucking Hell
programs.desc: Lantern recovery op Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a 20-tonne drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. A few miles east, fellow recovery op Stu is also in a tricky predicament.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: In Louisiana, a seasoned collector and his grandson open the doors to a pool hall turned catch-all, where Mike uncovers an ultra-rare pinball machine.

programs.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programs.desc: Honey's overbearing mother ridicules her idea of attending a parenting class; Louis and Marvin's free cruise quickly turns into a gambling getaway gone south.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: Lisa makes a shocking college decision, wounding Marge.

programs.title: The Simpsons
programs.desc: A British secret agent comes to Springfield in search of a Russian spy.
